description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The SPK Company Ltd account will transfer all of the SPK tokens held by it, other than the tokens specified in [A.6.1.1.1.2.1.4.2.1.2.4 - Transfer Of Tokens For Token Launch](950458c9-dfa7-4c1f-a30a-05d7468fa1c6), to the Spark Foundation. The SPK Company Ltd account is specified in [A.6.1.1.1.2.1.4.2.1.2.1 - Minting Of Tokens To SPK Company Ltd](8b3b46b1-e16a-4d1a-b4d0-52b4cc01ca4f).
The address of the Spark Foundation on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0x92e4629a4510AF5819d7D1601464C233599fF5ec`.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
